Hi ! I'm Farhan Abrol.

I'm a computer scientist living in San Francisco.

I build high-performance distributed systems @Pure Storage.

I enjoy machine learning and have worked on improving Stochastic Variational Inference in the past.

For more check out my Resume.

Contact me at @F_Abrol or by email.
